name: Thrust Calculator
description: Calculate thrust produced by a rocket engine based on mass flow rate and exhaust velocity.
formula: Thrust = mass flow rate * exhaust velocity
formulaDescription: A simplified thrust equation assuming constant exhaust velocity.

example.explanation: A mass flow rate of 250 kg/s with 3000 m/s exhaust velocity produces 750,000 N of thrust.

faqs.question: What is exhaust velocity?
faqs.answer: Exhaust velocity is the speed at which propellant exits the engine and is a key factor in thrust.
